user.title: Connect a developer account
user.description: Enter the developer application credentials registered for this Hyundai or Kia account.

authorize.title: Authorize {brand}
authorize.description: Open the [authorization page]({authorization_url}), complete login, then paste the entire redirected URL below. The pasted URL and one-time code are not stored.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate account
reauth_confirm.description: This account can no longer refresh its access token. Continue to authorize it again using the saved developer credentials.

reconfigure.title: Update developer credentials
reconfigure.description: Change the account or developer application details, then authorize the account again. Leave Client secret empty to keep the saved value.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the vehicle API.
error.invalid_auth: Authorization failed. Check the pasted URL and developer credentials.
error.invalid_redirect_uri: Enter a valid HTTPS redirect URI.

abort.already_configured: This account or vehicle is already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the vehicle API.
abort.wrong_account: The authorized account cannot access the existing vehicle.

init.title: Polling options
init.description: Choose how often enabled vehicle sensors are refreshed.

user.title: Add a vehicle
user.description: Enter a friendly name and the car ID available to this authenticated account.

reconfigure.title: Update vehicle
reconfigure.description: Rename the vehicle or replace its car ID.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the vehicle API.
error.invalid_auth: The account needs to be reauthenticated.
error.invalid_vehicle: The account could not read both required metrics for this car ID.

cannot_connect.message: Unable to connect to the Hyundai/Kia developer API.

invalid_auth.message: The Hyundai/Kia developer account needs to be reauthenticated.

update_failed.message: Unable to update any configured vehicle metric.
